title: Asuka is coming to Australia
wikitext:
[]: Asuka is coming to Australia!             Quote Post by Leighton » Fri Apr 29, 2011 12:02 pm Yes the voice actors. To be specific Yuko Miyamura, Tiffany Grant and Matt Greenfield will be attending. They'll be attending the "Supanova Pop Culture Expo" in mid June, which i assume many of you already know. Anyways i may be going, but being a shy and timid person (particularly with the ladies) and for the first time being able to physically be in the presence of Asuka's voice actors, i have not been able to think of any questions to ask them... Is there anything i should ask in particular about Eva? Anyone here have a question they'd want to be answered?

[]: Re: Asuka is coming to Australia!             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Apr 29, 2011 12:06 pm Leighton wrote: Anyways i may be going, but being a shy and timid person (particularly with the ladies) and for the first time being able to physically be in the presence of Asuka's voice actors,

[]: Re: Asuka is coming to Australia!             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Fri Apr 29, 2011 12:11 pm Leighton wrote: Yes the voice actors. To be specific Yuko Miyamura, Tiffany Grant and Matt Greenfield will be attending. They'll be attending the "Supanova Pop Culture Expo" in mid June, which i assume many of you already know. Anyways i may be going, but being a shy and timid person (particularly with the ladies) and for the first time being able to physically be in the presence of Asuka's voice actors, i have not been able to think of any questions to ask them... Is there anything i should ask in particular about Eva? Anyone here have a question they'd want to be answered?

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Fri Apr 29, 2011 1:44 pm Where´s a Light when you need one.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Fri Apr 29, 2011 1:46 pm So, it's kind of, like... Asuka s are coming to Australia. Is this, like, an annual thing for them now?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Apr 29, 2011 3:39 pm uh... What it was like to return for 2.X after such a long time? Also, In Miyamura's case.... Q hints? How is the production progressing/to which degree is it finished? Also, ask if Asuka will do some cool stuff. They won't tell us WHAT she'll do, but maybe we'll get something vaugue like "She'll do something surprising", "She'll have a large role" or "There will be a cool battle scene"...

[]: Re: Asuka is coming to Australia!             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Fri Apr 29, 2011 3:48 pm Tarnsman wrote: I always see "and Matt Greenfield" when it comes to the Miyamura/Grant going to the same convention and I can't help but think that he must be the biggest third wheel of all time.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Apr 29, 2011 5:28 pm Ask Tiff if whether she she considers the difference are from Soryu to Shikinami and whether she was asked to play the character any different from the orignal show. Also ask her which was most batshit insane thing to work on out of EoE and Puni Puni Poemy. Also I would be very much in your debt if you would ask whether her going to the UK is in the offing.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Fri Apr 29, 2011 5:37 pm Jayfive wrote: Also ask her which was most batshit insane thing to work on out of EoE and Puni Puni Poemy.

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Fri Apr 29, 2011 5:50 pm gatotsu911 wrote: Yes, please . Billing idea: "Featuring Yuko Miyamura, Tiffany Grant, and some guy with a mustache." Maybe someone will think it's Anno!! Can you say ticket sales

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Apr 29, 2011 5:58 pm Well, they are married . Is it really that odd?

[]:             Quote Post by Cody MacArthur Fett » Fri Apr 29, 2011 6:04 pm Huh, now I'm wondering if Seki Takayuki will show up too, and if he does if he and Yuko will go on a double date with Matt and Tiffany.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Apr 29, 2011 6:04 pm No! Better yet! Get Miyamura to say her lines in English, and Grant to say her lines in Japanese! There will be hilarity enough for both cultures!

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Fri Apr 29, 2011 6:17 pm Tarnsman wrote: I would personally like: "This *insert date here* we have Yuko Miyamura, an batshit crazy lady from Texas and some other guy that no one cares about at *insert con here*"

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Fri Apr 29, 2011 7:05 pm Ornette wrote: Well, they are married . Is it really that odd?

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Fri Apr 29, 2011 7:21 pm symbv wrote: Why odd? Seiyuu being married is not uncommon.... Or I missed something here?

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Fri Apr 29, 2011 7:25 pm toe mash wrote: He means that it isn't odd that Tiffany and Matt travel together, like numerous people said in the thread.

[]:             Quote Post by evafanatic » Fri Apr 29, 2011 7:41 pm Just wondering how often Miyamura travels to Australia? And when was the last time she's visited the US ?

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Fri Apr 29, 2011 8:10 pm Leighton wrote: To be specific Yuko Miyamura, Tiffany Grant and Matt Greenfield will be attending.

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Fri Apr 29, 2011 8:27 pm evafanatic wrote: Just wondering how often Miyamura travels to Australia? And when was the last time she's visited the US ?
